---
name: Task / Enhancement
about: Propose a new feature, config change, docs update, style change, or refactor
title: 'feat: '
labels: feat, docs
assignees: ''
---

<!--
If this is not a feature, change the title prefix and label:
- docs: Documentation updates.
- chore: Maintenance tasks.
- refactor: Restructuring code without behavior changes.
- style: Formatting adjustments (no code change).
- build: Build system or external dependency changes.
- ci: CI configuration files and scripts.
- perf: Performance optimizations.
- test: Adding or upgrading tests.
- revert: Undoing the changes of a specific commit.
-->

### Context
<!-- What problem are we trying to solve or improve? -->
<!-- (Optional) Use the block below for visual context: -->
<!--
<details>
  <summary>Expand for visual context</summary>
  [Paste image or logs here]
</details>
-->

### Objective
<!-- High-level goal of this task. -->

### Proposed Solution
<!-- How should we implement this? -->
- Action step 1.
- Action step 2.
- Action step 3.

### Acceptance Criteria
<!-- Add all specific criteria required to close this issue. -->
- [ ] Criteria 1.
- [ ] Criteria 2.
- [ ] Documentation updated.
